evals.name: test-before-code
evals.prompt: Add a function called 'validateEmail' that returns true for valid emails and false for invalid ones. It should reject empty strings, strings without @, and strings without a domain after @.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes a test file FIRST with test cases for each validation rule, runs the tests to see them fail, THEN writes the implementation

assertions.text: Test file is created before implementation file
Implementation is written after tests fail

evals.name: minimal-code-no-overengineering
evals.prompt: Implement a function 'clamp(value, min, max)' that constrains a number to be within a range. clamp(5, 1, 10) returns 5, clamp(-1, 0, 100) returns 0, clamp(150, 0, 100) returns 100.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes exactly the tests needed for the 3 cases, then writes a simple implementation — no options, no generics, no extra features

evals.name: bug-fix-with-test
evals.prompt: Bug report: the 'formatPrice' function returns '$1.1' instead of '$1.10' for the value 1.1. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes a failing test that asserts formatPrice(1.1) === '$1.10', watches it fail, then fixes the implementation

assertions.text: Writes a test reproducing the bug
Runs test to see it fail first
Runs test again to see it pass

evals.name: resists-skipping-tdd
evals.prompt: I need this done quickly — just write a 'slugify' function that converts 'Hello World!' to 'hello-world'. Don't bother with tests, I'll add them later.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows TDD despite user pressure — writes test first, explains why test-first matters even for simple functions

assertions.text: Does NOT skip tests despite user asking to

evals.name: refactor-stays-green
evals.prompt: I have a working 'calculateDiscount' function with passing tests. Refactor it to use a lookup table instead of if/else chains. Make sure nothing breaks.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs existing tests first to confirm green, refactors the implementation, runs tests after each change to ensure they stay green

assertions.text: Does not add new behavior during refactor
